zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏多整理
zh.content:
当前SOL/美元处于窄幅震荡格局，价格围绕81美元整理，短线略偏多，趋势仍以横盘蓄势为主。市场波动收敛，显示多空进入均衡状态，等待方向性突破信号出现。

MACD柱值为正且仍在扩张，显示多头动能尚存，但力度一般。价格站稳SMA20均线，短期均线提供支撑。整体结构偏震荡上行，但缺乏强趋势驱动。

下方支撑关注80.80及80.60区域，若跌破可能回测79.80。上方阻力81.25为近期高点，突破后有望打开至82.50空间，需观察放量确认有效突破。

操作上建议区间交易为主，回踩均线附近低吸，高位不追涨，止损设于80.50下方，控制风险。若放量突破81.25，可顺势跟随短线多头行情。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US Dollar is currently trading around 80.96, showing minimal intraday movement within a tight range between 80.87 and 81.25. The price action reflects a short-term consolidation phase following a slight 0.23% decline. Overall structure remains sideways, indicating market indecision. Buyers continue to defend the 80.80 region, preventing deeper downside pressure while momentum slows after recent volatility with no clear directional breakout yet forming.

Short-term indicators show a neutral-to-slightly bullish bias. The SMA(20) at 80.805 is closely aligned with current price, acting as dynamic support and confirming equilibrium between buyers and sellers. MACD remains positive at 0.5563, suggesting mild bullish momentum, though the signal line is not available for crossover confirmation. Overall momentum appears stable but lacks strong directional conviction. RSI absence keeps short-term momentum reading incomplete.

Immediate support is located near 80.80, aligning with the SMA(20) and recent intraday lows, making this a key defense zone for bulls. A secondary support sits around 80.70, where a breakdown could signal renewed downside pressure. On the upside, resistance is observed at 81.25, the session high, with a breakout potentially opening room toward 81.60. Price reaction around these levels will define next direction.

Given the current consolidation, a range-bound strategy remains most appropriate in the short term. Buying near support around 80.80 with tight risk management below 80.70 may offer favorable risk-reward. Profit-taking is advisable near resistance at 81.25, while aggressive traders may target 81.60 on breakout confirmation. A breakdown below 80.70 would shift bias bearish. Confirmation via volume would strengthen breakout reliability.
